\begin{Verbatim}[breaklines=true,formatcom=\color{ada_blue}]
# Create lagged variables, dropping the first observation
n <- nrow(USSteamCoEstim2)

# Current period t and lagged period t - 1
trans <- USSteamCoEstim2[-1, ]
lag <- USSteamCoEstim2[-n, ]

# Construct original interaction terms first
trans$prod_summer <- trans$production * trans$summer
trans$heat_summer <- trans$heatDD * trans$summer
trans$cool_summer <- trans$coolDD * trans$summer

lag$prod_summer <- lag$production * lag$summer
lag$heat_summer <- lag$heatDD * lag$summer
lag$cool_summer <- lag$coolDD * lag$summer

# Transform dependent variable
trans$revenue_adj <- trans$revenue - rho * lag$revenue

# Transform independent variables
trans$production_adj <- trans$production - rho * lag$production
trans$heatDD_adj <- trans$heatDD - rho * lag$heatDD
trans$coolDD_adj <- trans$coolDD - rho * lag$coolDD
trans$summer_adj <- trans$summer - rho * lag$summer

# Transform interaction terms
trans$prod_summer_adj <- trans$prod_summer - rho * lag$prod_summer
trans$heat_summer_adj <- trans$heat_summer - rho * lag$heat_summer
trans$cool_summer_adj <- trans$cool_summer - rho * lag$cool_summer
\end{Verbatim}
\endgroup
\par\addvspace{\topsep}

\noindent We fit a new model using the transformed variables.
